item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 7min Forest reach their first European semi-final in 40 years to bring in our Epic Boost!
Stay tuned for more soon.
18+ | GambleAware Cita William Hill @WilliamHill · 12h Nottingham Forest beat Porto 2-0 during the league phase of the Europa League.
𝐄𝐩𝐢𝐜 𝐁𝐨𝐨𝐬𝐭 is 𝐋𝐈𝐕𝐄 on tonight's game.
18+ GambleAware 781
